CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385.
Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar May-01-2024 Set For Trial On Mar-10-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate The Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOHN MYERS, Esq. of Bickelssannipoli APC (Tel: 619-374-4100) for plaintiff;
Atty. MICHAEL BAKER, Esq. of the Law Office of Abtin Amir, PC (Tel: 818-336-1324) for defendant BMW of North America, LLC.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LE TRAN's Motion To Vacate The Order Compelling Arbitration.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to vacate the order compelling arbitration is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Continued To May-15-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jordan Sannipoli, Esq. 619-374-4100 Bickel Sannipoli APC for Plaintiff.
Abtin Amir, Esq. 818-336-1324 for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Ms Sannipoli argues and cites Ochoa. Mr. Amir responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC Motion To Compel Arbitration

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration is granted. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2023 Continued To May-17-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
